'''Nizon''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Centares system/Legends|Centares system]]. It was the homeworld of the [[Nazren]] species. Agents of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] provoked the [[Nizon resistance|local resistance]] to [[Battle of Nizon|oust]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation and [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] some months after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
